summary: Iteration 136: Cake Designer v3.0 Asset Library - All backend and frontend tests passed. 40/40 backend tests passed covering textures (15), piping patterns (12), flowers (8), templates (12 across 5 categories), stands (10), order generation with full costing, and consultation CRUD. Frontend CakeDesigner3D verified: 4 tabs, 7 shapes, 8 frostings, Production toggle with COGs/Labor/Total Cost breakdown.

verified_features.BACKEND_textures_15: PASS - GET /api/cake-assets/textures returns 15 textures with roughness/metalness values
verified_features.BACKEND_mirror_glaze: PASS - Mirror Glaze has roughness 0.08, metalness 0.3
verified_features.BACKEND_geode_crystal: PASS - Geode Crystal texture exists in special category
verified_features.BACKEND_metallic_textures: PASS - Gold, Silver, Rose Gold metallic textures exist
verified_features.BACKEND_piping_12: PASS - GET /api/cake-assets/piping returns 12 patterns with complexity and time_min
verified_features.BACKEND_cornelli_lace: PASS - Cornelli Lace has complexity 5, time 120 min
verified_features.BACKEND_basket_weave: PASS - Basket Weave has complexity 4, time 90 min
verified_features.BACKEND_flowers_8: PASS - GET /api/cake-assets/flowers returns 8 arrangements with time_hr and cost_per
verified_features.BACKEND_cascading_roses: PASS - Cascading Roses exists with cascade style
verified_features.BACKEND_orchid_spray: PASS - Orchid Spray exists with spray style
verified_features.BACKEND_templates_5_categories: PASS - Templates span wedding, kids, novelty, seasonal, celebration
verified_features.BACKEND_classic_wedding: PASS - Classic Wedding 3-Tier template exists with 3 tiers
verified_features.BACKEND_mad_hatter: PASS - Mad Hatter Tea Party template exists in novelty category
verified_features.BACKEND_princess_castle: PASS - Princess Castle template exists in kids category
verified_features.BACKEND_christmas: PASS - Christmas Elegance template exists in seasonal category
verified_features.BACKEND_mirror_glaze_showpiece: PASS - Mirror Glaze Showpiece template exists in celebration category
verified_features.BACKEND_stands_10: PASS - GET /api/cake-assets/stands returns 10 stands with metalness/roughness/price
verified_features.BACKEND_wood_rustic: PASS - Rustic Wood Slice stand exists with metalness 0
verified_features.BACKEND_acrylic_clear: PASS - Clear Acrylic Riser stand exists
verified_features.BACKEND_order_creation: PASS - POST /api/cake-assets/order returns order_number starting with CK-
verified_features.BACKEND_order_costing: PASS - Order includes full costing breakdown (food_cost, labor_hours, labor_cost, total_cost, suggested_price, per_serving)
verified_features.BACKEND_order_production_notes: PASS - Order includes production_notes with assembly time
verified_features.BACKEND_order_tier_details: PASS - Order includes tier details with servings and costs
verified_features.BACKEND_consultation_create: PASS - POST /api/cake-consultation/create returns session_id and share_link
verified_features.BACKEND_consultation_approve: PASS - POST /api/cake-consultation/session/{id}/approve marks session as approved
verified_features.FRONTEND_4_tabs: PASS - Design, Gallery, Decor, AI tabs all present
verified_features.FRONTEND_7_shapes: PASS - Round, Square, Heart, Hex, Sheet, Mad Hatter, Topsy shapes available
verified_features.FRONTEND_8_frostings: PASS - Buttercream, Fondant, Ganache, Naked, Rustic, Metallic, Drip, Ombre styles available
verified_features.FRONTEND_production_toggle: PASS - Production toggle switches between 'Client View' and 'Production View ON'
verified_features.FRONTEND_production_view_breakdown: PASS - Production View shows Servings, COGs, Labor, Total Cost, Cost/Serving, Suggested Price

seed_data_creation: Created test orders and consultations with TEST_ prefix for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cake Designer v3.0 Asset Library fully functional. Backend: 15 textures (mirror glaze 0.08/0.3, geode, marble, metallic, watercolor), 12 piping patterns (cornelli lace complexity 5/120min, basket weave 4/90min), 8 flower arrangements (cascading roses, sugar peonies, orchid spray, tropical), 12 templates across 5 categories (wedding/kids/novelty/seasonal/celebration), 10 stands (crystal, wood, acrylic, floating). Order generation creates print-ready orders with full costing breakdown. Consultation CRUD + WebSocket at /api/cake-consultation/ws/{session_id}. Frontend CakeDesigner3D has 4 tabs, 7 shapes including Mad Hatter and Topsy-turvy, 8 frosting styles including drip and ombre, Production toggle hides COGs from client view. Navigation: CULINARY OPERATIONS > Pastry > CAKE BUILDER.
